title: Evangelion Chronicle Illustrations
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Chronicle Illustrations             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Nov 13, 2012 1:34 pm So I was browsing Barnes & Noble, looking into the omnibus release of the Sadamoto manga, and I came across this: http://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/evangelion-chronicle-weve-inc/1112136483 Apparently released by Udon Entertainment: http://www.udonentertainment.com/blog/udon/evangelion-chronicle-illustrations/ I don't think I've heard anything about this. Anyone know anything about it?

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Nov 13, 2012 1:45 pm I think that it was mentioned in some thread, I remember reading the announcement on ANN .

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Tue Nov 13, 2012 1:47 pm Udon Entertainment is releasing both the illustrations and all of the Evangelion chronicle fully translated at a later date.

[]:             Quote Post by Rj123541 » Tue Nov 13, 2012 1:47 pm Ahh I am so late with all of the Doujinshi,manga, and everything else related.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Nov 13, 2012 1:52 pm bobbyfischer's ghost wrote: Udon Entertainment is releasing both the illustrations and all of the Evangelion chronicle fully translated at a later date.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Nov 13, 2012 2:00 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: I think that it was mentioned in some thread, I remember reading the announcement on ANN .

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Tue Nov 13, 2012 2:02 pm Yes your probably right , the article I read was from a while back.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Nov 13, 2012 2:08 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Ahh good, thank you sir. I was having trouble finding mention of it. Did this not get mentioned at any point on the main site?

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Tue Nov 13, 2012 2:13 pm Yeah, well here's hoping the Chronicle Illustrations sell well enough so we can get more stuff released in the states.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Tue Nov 13, 2012 2:56 pm What I'm wondering is if they would do a translation of the revised version of ECI which has Asuka on the cover and came out last year. I'll probably spring for the translated ECI and am glad that I held off on Sides A and B.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Tue Nov 13, 2012 2:58 pm AR-99 wrote: What I'm wondering is if they would do a translation of the revised version of ECI which has Asuka on the cover and came out last year.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Tue Nov 13, 2012 3:03 pm They would also have to justify selling a artbook that repeats the artwork covered in the first version. Makes me wonder why they didn't or couldn't go for releasing the revised version instead. Just realized now too that I have both the original Die Sterne and the Ver. 2.0 update, but one can't predict that an update or a translation of an artbook will be published now, can they.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Tue Nov 13, 2012 3:06 pm licensing issues maybe, otherwise it doesn't make much sense.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Nov 13, 2012 3:07 pm Licensing issues or maybe they just preferred TEH Rei on the cover. EDIT: bobby literally ninja-ed me.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Tue Nov 13, 2012 3:13 pm :3 I've already ordered the revised version. Thank god for CDJapan.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Tue Nov 13, 2012 3:15 pm Yuppers, licensing is probably why there are other artbooks that came out earlier that still haven't been localized in English yet. The revised ECI = awesome sauce and hell, Asuka's the cover girl.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Nov 13, 2012 3:26 pm bobbyfischer's ghost wrote: :3 I've already ordered the revised version. Thank god for CDJapan.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Tue Nov 13, 2012 3:32 pm Isn't that Gainax's master plan? They hinted at otakunizing the human race back in Otaku no Video. However there is this resource called money...

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Tue Nov 13, 2012 3:34 pm Why not? ^^ But seriously I'll just skip out on the English version.

[]:             Quote Post by cyharding » Wed Nov 14, 2012 12:03 am Yeah, I got the revised edition from cdjapan as well. If Udon does release it here, it will probably be a couple of years at least.
